candidate_definitions.text: ComfyUI-Manager is an extension designed to enhance the usability of ComfyUI. It offers management functions to install, remove, disable, and enable various custom nodes of ComfyUI. Furthermore, this extension provides a hub feature and convenience functions to access a wide range of information within ComfyUI.
This is a helper extension for ComfyUI that assists with node connections.
for tile the image for advanced control or modification
Custom nodes pack for ComfyUI This custom node helps to conveniently enhance images through Detector, Detailer, Upscaler, Pipe, and more.
Animation oriented nodes pack for ComfyUI
📺 An End-to-End Solution for High-Resolution and Long Video Generation Based on Transformer Diffusion
Janky implementation of HiDiffusion for ComfyUI
A microframework on top of PyTorch with first-class citizen APIs for foundation model adaptation
Improved AnimateDiff for ComfyUI and Advanced Sampling Support
SCEPTER is an open-source framework used for training, fine-tuning, and inference with generative models.
